title: tephroseris aurea
intro: Tephroseris aurea, also known as the Golden Moss or Auricula, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Tephroseris aurea has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Tephroseris aurea can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
